headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
summary: Autodesk (ADSK) closed the most recent trading day at $231.98, moving 6.3% from the previous trading session.

headline: Shares of companies in the broader software sector are trading lower amid a pullback in sentiment after Q1 financial results and outlook comments from industry peers IBM and ServiceNow.
